splits.title: What Does the Church Owe Me?

files.notes: This file contains two editorial pieces that appear consecutively in the table of contents. The first is 'Editorial: The Old Order Changeth' on page 306, and the second is 'What Does the Church Owe Me?' on page 309. Both are editorial content discussing church leadership changes and member attitudes respectively.
